task.name: STOP-IT (jsPsych Stop Signal Task)
task.description: Stop-signal task. White left/right arrows require a corresponding arrow-key response on go trials. On stop-signal trials (~25%), the white arrow turns red after a variable stop-signal delay (SSD, starting at 200 ms, staircased by ±50 ms toward 50% commission accuracy); the participant must withhold the response. 1 practice block (32 trials) + 4 experimental blocks (64 trials each). MAXRT = 1250 ms from stimulus onset.

stimuli.description: Red leftward arrow (stop signal overlaying the go_left arrow)
Red rightward arrow (stop signal overlaying the go_right arrow)
White leftward arrow with black border (go trial; correct response = ArrowLeft)
White rightward arrow with black border (go trial; correct response = ArrowRight)

phase_detection.complete: !!document.querySelector('#jspsych-download-as-text-link') || ((document.body.textContent || '').includes('Thank you for your participation') && (typeof jsPsych !== 'undefined') && jsPsych.progress().percent_complete >= 100)
phase_detection.feedback: (() => { const t = document.body.textContent || ''; return t.includes('GO TRIALS:') || t.includes('STOP-SIGNAL TRIALS:') || t.includes('correct response') || t.includes('incorrect response') || t.includes('correct stop') || t.includes('remember: try to stop') || t.includes('too slow') || t.includes('too fast') || t.includes('Press space to begin') || t.includes('Get ready') || t.includes('Thank you for your participation'); })()
phase_detection.practice: (typeof jsPsych !== 'undefined') && (() => { const v = jsPsych.data.get().filter({trial_type: 'custom-stop-signal-plugin'}).values(); return v.length > 0 && v[v.length - 1].block_i === 0; })()

timing.response_window_js: (() => { const img = document.querySelector('img#jspsych-image-keyboard-response-stimulus'); if (!img) return false; const src = img.src || ''; return src.includes('go_') || src.includes('stop_'); })()
timing.trial_context_js: (() => { const img = document.querySelector('img#jspsych-image-keyboard-response-stimulus'); if (!img) return ''; const src = img.src || ''; const m = src.match(/(fix|go_left|go_right|stop_left|stop_right)/); return m ? m[1] : ''; })()

pilot_validation_config.rationale: The practice block runs NdesignReps_practice (=4) repetitions of the basic 8-trial design = 32 trials with expected proportions go_left:go_right:stop ≈ 3:3:2. 16 trials ensures all three conditions are observed at least once with very high probability while keeping the pilot brief; the practice block is the natural single-block scope (block_i == 0) and yields trial-by-trial feedback that helps surface selector/timing issues.

_reasoning_chain.inference: Identified paradigm 'STOP-IT (jsPsych Stop Signal Task)' with 4 stimuli. Source files: jquery-1.7.1.min.js, jspsych.js, jspsych-instructions.js, jspsych-fullscreen.js, jspsych-call-function.js, jspsych-html-keyboard-response.js, jspsych-detect-held-down-keys.js, custom-stop-signal-plugi.
